sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Conference Call Details
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. will host its Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Conference Call on February 19, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. Central Time, accessible via their investor website. The company, headquartered in Houston, serves approximately 7 million customers across multiple states and boasts $44 billion in assets. Insider trading over the last six months included one sale, and hedge funds have shown significant activity in the stock.

feed.title: NXP Unlocks Full Potential of SDVs
feed.summary: NXP Semiconductors has launched its new S32N7 super-integration processor series, expanding its 5nm automotive roadmap and advancing toward fully software-defined vehicle architectures. The S32N7 series is designed to centralize core vehicle functions, reducing complexity and total cost of ownership by up to 20%, while enabling AI-driven innovations. Bosch is the first company to integrate the S32N7 into its vehicle-integration platform, highlighting the collaborative effort to accelerate system deployment.

feed.title: DuPont Announces Appointment of D.G. Macpherson to Board of Directors
feed.summary: DuPont has announced the appointment of D.G. Macpherson to its Board of Directors, effective immediately. Macpherson, currently Chairman and CEO of W.W. Grainger, Inc., brings extensive expertise in operational excellence, supply chain optimization, and business transformation. His appointment is expected to help DuPont advance its growth strategy and deliver long-term value.

feed.title: Medtronic to invest up to $90M in Anteris Technologies
feed.summary: Medtronic (NYSE: MDT) plans to invest up to $90 million in Anteris Technologies (Nasdaq: AVR, ASX: AVR), acquiring a 16.0–19.99% stake in the transcatheter heart valve developer. Anteris also announced a proposed $200 million public offering. The funds will support the DurAVR transcatheter heart valve global pivotal trial, expand manufacturing capabilities, and fund R&D for v2vmedtech Inc.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy prepares for cold weather across Texas; closely monitors potential for severe weather conditions
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy is actively preparing for severe cold weather and potential icy conditions across its Texas service territory. The company's electric and natural gas teams are undertaking coordinated efforts, including inspecting and testing critical equipment, hardening infrastructure, and coordinating with emergency responders and officials. CenterPoint also encourages customers to use its Winter Energy Guide and Power Alert Service to stay informed and prepare for winter weather.

feed.title: MGM to power its Strip resort-casinos with solar in the daytime
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International is advancing its sustainability goals by utilizing solar energy to power its Las Vegas Strip properties during daytime hours. This initiative is part of the company's commitment to power all its U.S. properties with renewable electricity by 2030, significantly bolstered by a power-purchase agreement with the Escape Solar and Storage Project in Lincoln County. CEO Bill Hornbuckle emphasized that this move not only supports a more resilient energy future but also offers long-term cost stability for the business.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies Stock: Quiet Cloud Veteran, Loud Numbers – Is Wall Street Still Underpricing This Edge Giant?
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies is evolving from a CDN provider into a leader in security, edge computing, and cloud services, with its stock showing steady gains over the past year. Analysts generally have a bullish to neutral stance, raising price targets as Akamai leverages its extensive network for security, distributed cloud, and AI inference. The company's future hinges on its ability to grow its security segment and successfully expand its edge cloud offerings against hyperscale competitors while managing shareholder expectations for margin expansion.

feed.title: Tempest Therapeutics Announces Record Date for Warrant Dividends Distribution Following Asset Purchase Agreement
feed.summary: Tempest Therapeutics has announced January 30, 2026, as the record date for the distribution of warrants to purchase its common stock, with the distribution expected on February 3, 2026. This move follows an Asset Purchase Agreement and is contingent on stockholder approval. Each stockholder will receive one warrant per share, exercisable at $18.48 for five years, as part of the company's strategy to advance its cancer treatment pipeline.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) Trading 1.7% Higher - Here's Why
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble's (NYSE:PG) stock increased by 1.7% to $146.96 on Tuesday, with trading volume up 8%. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for the stock, with an average target price of $168.36, and the company recently beat EPS expectations and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.0568. Key financial metrics, recent analyst reports, insider trading, and institutional ownership are detailed, highlighting the consumer goods giant's performance and market sentiment.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) Trading Down 1.9% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) shares dropped 1.9% following a collaboration with Microsoft to use AI for earlier lung cancer detection and a dividend increase. Despite mixed Wall Street views, the company's strategic AI move and increased dividend highlight operational positives. Institutional investors have also significantly increased their stakes in BMY.

feed.title: ServiceNow partners with OpenAI to develop and deploy enterprise-grade AI agents
feed.summary: ServiceNow has signed a three-year deal with OpenAI to integrate the ChatGPT maker's advanced AI models into its enterprise platforms, focusing on agentic AI for workflow automation. The partnership aims to boost OpenAI's enterprise revenue and provide ServiceNow with cutting-edge AI capabilities as an alternative to its own LLMs, enabling the development of more human-like customer service agents and tools for accessing siloed data. Both companies emphasize the importance of such collaborations to drive the adoption and deployment of agentic AI at scale.

feed.title: Duolingo CFO stepping down, company taps Vimeo CFO as replacement - Bizwomen
feed.summary: Duolingo's CFO, Matt Skaruppa, is stepping down after almost six years with the company, having overseen its successful IPO. Gillian Munson, a current board member and former Vimeo CFO, will replace him. Skaruppa will remain in an advisory role during the transition.

feed.title: Teledyne’s Detectors Successfully Launch Aboard NASA’s BlackCAT CubeSat Mission
feed.summary: Teledyne's Space Imaging division successfully launched its Speedster HyViSI detectors aboard NASA's BlackCAT CubeSat mission on January 11, 2026, as part of SpaceX's "Twilight" rideshare. These detectors form the core of BlackCAT's X-ray instrument, enabling it to function as an X-ray observatory. The mission aims to detect transient X-ray events and study bursts from collapsing early stars, offering new insights into the early universe.

feed.title: Western Midstream Resets Delaware Basin Natural Gas Contracts in $610M Oxy Deal
feed.summary: Western Midstream Partners LP is transitioning from cost-of-service natural gas contracts to fixed-fee agreements in the Delaware Basin with its primary customer, Occidental Petroleum Corp. This $610 million deal aims to streamline operations and position Western Midstream as a more mature, standalone midstream business. The new fixed-fee contracts are set to extend through the late 2030s.

feed.title: Zhongchao (NASDAQ: ZCMD) pursues broad reverse share split authority
feed.summary: Zhongchao Inc. (NASDAQ: ZCMD) is seeking shareholder approval for an amended proposal allowing its board broad authority to implement one or multiple reverse stock splits over three years, with a cumulative ratio between 2:1 and 250:1. This move is primarily aimed at satisfying Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement, as the company's Class A shares closed at US$0.62 on November 25, 2025. The company has adjourned shareholder meetings to allow more time for consideration of these proposals, which also include a significant increase in authorized share capital.

feed.title: TFI International reports $43 million in data center transport revenue
feed.summary: TFI International (NYSE and TSX:TFII) announced its data center-related transportation business generated $43 million in revenue in 2025, with significant quarterly growth. The North American transportation and logistics company also reported over $110 million in electric grid-related revenue and appointed Scott Hoppe as Chief Commercial Officer of SFI to focus on these growing sectors. TFI International’s stock price has risen 27.4% over the past six months.

feed.title: Anteris Technologies Global Corp Files Prospectus For Upto $200 Million Shares Of Common Stock
feed.summary: Anteris Technologies Global Corp has filed a prospectus to offer up to $200 million worth of common stock. This news, reported by Refinitiv, indicates a potential capital raise for the company.

feed.title: KKR-led Consortium Drives Further Investment in Sylvan
feed.summary: Global investment firm KKR has completed an additional investment in Sylvan, a fungal biotechnology company, through funds managed by KKR and with participation from new and existing investors, including Novo Holdings. This investment aims to support Sylvan's expansion, capacity increase, R&D, new product categories, and market presence in Asia. KKR remains the majority investor, with additional commitments from global investors like TPG NewQuest, Ping’An Capital, China Post Insurance, Schroders Capital, and Tsao Pao Chee.

feed.title: IShares Silver Trust Options Spot-On: On January 20th, 1.65 Million Contracts Were Traded, With 12.35 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On January 20th ET, iShares Silver Trust (SLV.US) experienced active options trading with a total volume of 1.65 million contracts, where call options slightly outnumbered put options. The open interest for SLV.US stood at approximately 12.35 million contracts, significantly higher than its 30-day average, indicating strong investor interest. A notable unusual trade involved a put option with a $69.00 strike price expiring on March 20th, 2026, transacting 15,500 contracts and reflecting a turnover of $3.84 million.

feed.title: TPET: Revenue up 87% with narrowed losses, but ongoing reliance on external funding and regulatory risks persist
feed.summary: Trio Petroleum Corp. (TPET) reported an 87% increase in revenue, largely due to new Canadian production, and managed to narrow its net losses through cost reductions and asset reallocations. Despite these improvements, the company's financial stability remains dependent on external funding, and it continues to face significant regulatory and operational challenges, particularly as it focuses on expanding its Canadian assets.

feed.title: Arcellx director Lubner sells $450k in ACLX stock
feed.summary: Arcellx director David Charles Lubner sold 6,000 shares of ACLX common stock for $450,000 and simultaneously exercised options to acquire 6,000 shares for $37,680 on January 20, 2026. Following these transactions, Lubner directly owns 21,659 shares. Despite analyst concerns about overvaluation and expected sales decline, Arcellx maintains a strong balance sheet and positive analyst ratings due to promising clinical trial data.

feed.title: KKR-led Consortium Drives Further Investment in Sylvan
feed.summary: A KKR-led consortium, including new and existing investors like Novo Holdings and TPG NewQuest, has completed an additional investment in Sylvan, a leading fungal biotechnology company founded in 1932. This investment aims to support Sylvan's expansion by increasing production capacity, strengthening R&D, advancing new product categories, and deepening its presence in Asian markets. KKR remains the majority investor, emphasizing its continued commitment to Sylvan's growth in global fungal biotechnology solutions.

feed.title: 3 Things Investors Need to Know About Goldman Sachs Stock in 2026
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs delivered strong fourth-quarter earnings, driven by robust investment banking activity that CEO David Solomon expects to accelerate in 2026. The bank is also transitioning out of its Apple Card program and is embracing AI to improve efficiency and redirect resources towards asset and wealth management. With its current valuation and future tailwinds, the article suggests Goldman Sachs stock has potential for further upside.

feed.title: GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) Trading Down 4% - What's Next?
feed.summary: GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) saw its stock decline by 4% to $311.98 during Tuesday's trading, with a significant increase in trading volume. Despite the drop, analyst sentiment remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $314, and the company recently beat quarterly earnings expectations. The firm also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.36, while insider selling and institutional investments have shown some mixed activity.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) Valuation In Focus After Strong Momentum And Conflicting Fair Value Estimates
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) has seen significant momentum with a 22.2% return over the past month and 47.3% over three months, prompting a re-evaluation of its stock. While a popular narrative suggests the company is 24% overvalued with a fair value of US$48.52 due to expected earnings, an alternative discounted cash flow (DCF) model from Simply Wall St indicates a fair value of US$109.90, suggesting it could be undervalued by 45.3%. Investors are left to weigh these conflicting valuations and potential risks like operational disruptions or increased environmental costs.

feed.title: Horseshoe Indy Opens New Community Center
feed.summary: Horseshoe Indianapolis, owned by Caesars Entertainment, is opening the "Heaven and Horseshoes Community Center" with a grand opening and ribbon-cutting ceremony on Friday, February 6. The event will feature a program with retired Hall of Fame Jockey Pat Day and will be followed by lunch. The center aims to serve the horse racing community near the barn area.

feed.title: Chipotle’s Executive Shakeup Puts Legal People And Brand In Focus
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill has announced an executive shakeup, appointing Ilene Eskenazi as Chief Legal and Human Resources Officer and restructuring the Chief Marketing Officer role. These changes consolidate legal, compliance, and people functions under one leader and involve a new interim CMO. Investors should monitor how these leadership transitions impact Chipotle's growth strategy, brand identity, and operational execution in a competitive market.

feed.title: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) Shares Down 1.8% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) shares dropped 1.8% on Tuesday, trading at approximately $127.51 with lower-than-average volume. Despite this dip, which puts the stock below its 50-day and 200-day moving averages, analyst sentiment remains largely positive with a "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $164.44. The company recently exceeded earnings and revenue expectations in its quarterly report, demonstrating strong year-over-year growth and profitability.

feed.title: Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOG) Stock Price Down 2.5% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Alphabet's (NASDAQ:GOOG) stock fell 2.5% to $322.16 on Tuesday with higher-than-average trading volume. Key drivers include increasing demand for its Gemini AI models and recent positive analyst price target revisions, despite a broader tech selloff and significant insider selling. The company reported strong Q3 earnings and issued a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) has seen recent share price weakness, with declines over various periods, despite 3-year and 5-year gains. Valuation checks by Simply Wall St suggest the stock is overvalued, scoring 0 out of 6 on perceived undervaluation. Both Discounted Cash Flow and Price-to-Earnings analyses indicate the shares are expensive, although different "Narratives" for the company can lead to varying fair value conclusions.

feed.title: Digital Turbine Appoints Sea Yen Ong as Regional Vice President, Sales, APAC
feed.summary: Digital Turbine (NASDAQ: APPS) has announced the appointment of Sea Yen Ong as Regional Vice President, Sales, APAC. Based in Singapore, he will lead the company's brand and agency strategy across the region, focusing on driving growth and strengthening relationships with brands and agencies. Ong, who previously held senior leadership roles at TikTok and Spotify, will leverage Digital Turbine's mobile ecosystem and partnerships to enhance brand outcomes and expand market coverage in the dynamic APAC region.

feed.title: 3 Things Investors Need to Know About Goldman Sachs Stock in 2026
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs delivered strong fourth-quarter earnings, driven by robust investment banking activity which CEO David Solomon expects to accelerate in 2026. The bank is also strategically exiting its Apple Card business, transitioning $20 billion in balances to JPMorgan Chase, as it pivots away from consumer banking towards more profitable areas like asset and wealth management. Furthermore, Goldman Sachs is embracing AI-driven efficiencies through "One Goldman Sachs 3.0" to boost productivity and better allocate capital.

feed.title: Aura Biosciences SVP Amy Elazzouzi sells $7683 in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Amy Elazzouzi, Senior Vice President of Finance at Aura Biosciences (NASDAQ:AURA), sold 1,581 shares of common stock for $7,683 on January 20, 2026. This transaction was an automatic sale to cover tax withholding obligations related to restricted stock unit vesting. Following this, Evercore ISI resumed coverage of Aura Biosciences with an Outperform rating and a $13.00 price target, citing its innovative photosensitive payload technology for treating early-stage cancers.

feed.title: urban-gro Disclosed Failure to Satisfy a Continued Listing Rule or Standard
feed.summary: urban-gro (UGRO) announced that a Nasdaq Hearings Panel has granted it an extension until February 17, 2026, to regain compliance with multiple listing requirements, including stockholders' equity, annual meeting, and timely filings, and until February 24, 2026, for the minimum bid price. The company remains non-compliant and warns of potential delisting and adverse effects if it fails to meet these deadlines, noting there's no assurance of compliance. This information is based on an SEC Filing dated January 20, 2026.

feed.title: Apple Hospitality REIT, Inc. (NYSE:APLE) Declares Monthly Dividend of $0.08
feed.summary: Apple Hospitality REIT (NYSE:APLE) declared a monthly dividend of $0.08 per share, which annualizes to $0.96 and represents a 7.9% yield. While the current payout ratio of 124.7% suggests the dividend is not covered by current earnings, analysts project earnings per share of $1.62 for next year, implying a future payout ratio of 59.3%. The ex-dividend date is January 30th, with payment scheduled for February 17th.

feed.title: $87M CMBS Loan On Burbank Office Owned By Blackstone, Worthe Moves To Special Servicing
feed.summary: An $87M CMBS loan for The Pinnacle II, a Burbank office building majority-owned by Blackstone and Worthe Real Estate Group, has moved to special servicing due to an "imminent monetary default." The 225K SF property, which was fully vacant after Warner Bros. departed in 2022, is set to mature in June 2026, with only a quarter of its space expected to be leased by mid-2026. This situation highlights the broader challenges facing the Los Angeles entertainment-centric real estate market, as seen with another recent default on a Studio City soundstage.

feed.title: IQVIA to Announce Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results on February 5, 2026
feed.summary: IQVIA Holdings Inc. (NYSE:IQV) will announce its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results before the market opens on Thursday, February 5, 2026. The company's management team will host a conference call and webcast at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the results. Interested parties can find the earnings release, financial information, and registration details for the webcast on the IQVIA Investor Relations website.

feed.title: DuPont de Nemours, Inc. (DD) Appoints New Independent Director to Board
feed.summary: DuPont de Nemours, Inc. (DD) has appointed D.G. Macpherson as an independent director to its Board of Directors, effective immediately. Mr. Macpherson, CEO and Chairman of W.W. Grainger, Inc., brings extensive experience from the MRO industry and a background with Boston Consulting Group and the U.S. Air Force. This appointment aims to enhance DuPont's governance and leadership capabilities.

feed.title: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (MTD) Appoints New Independent Director
feed.summary: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (MTD) has announced the appointment of Michael J. Tokich as a new independent director, effective February 5, 2026, expanding its board from nine to ten members. Mr. Tokich's compensation will align with other independent directors, and his appointment reinforces the company's commitment to governance and transparency. This move is expected to bring valuable insights to support Mettler-Toledo's strategic objectives and long-term growth.

feed.title: Gary Black Says Tesla Won't Be 'Winner-Take-All' As Far As Autonomy Is Concerned, But A 'Blackberry Moment' Is Coming For OEMs Not In The Race
feed.summary: Investor Gary Black predicts that automakers failing to invest in autonomous driving technology will experience a "BlackBerry moment," similar to how BlackBerry was left behind by smartphone innovations. While he doesn't believe Tesla will be the sole victor in autonomy, he emphasizes the critical competitive advantage offered by unsupervised autonomous driving. Black questions the low adoption rate of Tesla's Full Self-Driving and notes that FSD will soon be subscription-only.

feed.title: Diodes Incorporated to Announce Q4 and FY 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Diodes Incorporated (DIOD) announced that it will hold a conference call on February 10, 2026, to discuss its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results. The results will be announced at 3:05 p.m. CT, followed by the conference call at 4:00 p.m. CT, featuring CEO Gary Yu and CFO Brett Whitmire. A replay of the call will be available until February 17, 2026, on the company's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: USCB Financial raises quarterly dividend 25% before March 5 payout
feed.summary: USCB Financial Holdings, Inc. announced a 25.0% increase in its regular quarterly cash dividend to $0.125 per share, up from $0.10. The dividend is payable on March 5, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 17, 2026. Future dividend payments remain subject to quarterly review and approval by the Board of Directors.

feed.title: TransAct Technologies appoints Dana Loof as chief marketing officer
feed.summary: TransAct Technologies has appointed Dana Loof as Chief Marketing Officer, leveraging her 30 years of experience in technology firms to unify brand positioning and drive customer demand. Loof previously served as CMO at Evolv Technologies Holdings, Inc., which has shown significant revenue growth and stock return. Her focus will be on strengthening TransAct's brand leadership and accelerating the adoption of its technology portfolio, including its BOHA! platform and casino/gaming solutions.

feed.title: Armada Hoffler director Wimbush buys $2,173 in shares
feed.summary: Armada Hoffler Properties director Frederick Blair Wimbush recently purchased 327.99 shares of the company's common stock for $2,173. Following this transaction, Wimbush directly owns 28,684.877 shares. Additionally, Armada Hoffler declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.14 per common share and a dividend of $0.421875 per share on its Series A Preferred Stock.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser Announces Tax Treatment of 2025 Dividend Distributions
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) has announced the income tax treatment for its 2025 dividend distributions, totaling $0.84 per share. All 2025 dividends are designated as capital gain distributions, making them ineligible for the 20 percent qualified business income deduction. The company advises shareholders to consult a tax advisor for their specific situations, noting that these allocations are based on the best available information prior to the filing of their 2025 tax return.

feed.title: HP (HPQ) Options Trade Flashes Courtesy of Resurgent PC Market
feed.summary: HPQ stock, despite underperforming in 2025, may see a resurgence due to an AI-driven tech refresh cycle in the PC market. Embedded AI in new PCs offers reduced latency and improved efficiency, creating a real incentive for upgrades, especially among enterprises. The options market shows elevated implied volatility for HPQ, suggesting a potential turnaround, with a specific bull call spread strategy identified based on Markovian analysis to target a probable price range of $21.90 to $22.70.

feed.title: SLB Libya Partnership Links Education Sustainability And Undervalued Share Opportunity
feed.summary: SLB has partnered with Libya's National Oil Corporation and Omar Al Mukhtar University to advance industry-aligned education, scientific research, and sustainability in Libya's oil and gas sector. This collaboration focuses on workforce development, reducing gas flaring, and carbon capture initiatives, demonstrating how service companies are aligning with national sustainability goals. The article also highlights SLB as undervalued, trading about 48.8% below its estimated fair value, with recent positive share price momentum.

feed.title: AI NetOps Leader NetBrain Closes Blackstone Investment to Scale Global Operations
feed.summary: NetBrain Technologies, an AI NetOps platform, has secured a majority investment from Blackstone Growth to accelerate its global expansion and enhance its AI-powered network automation platform. Alongside this investment, the company announced leadership changes, with Bernadette Nixon appointed CEO and founder Lingping Gao transitioning to Chair of the Board. New board members Gus Malezis and Jerry Guo have also joined, aiming to leverage Nixon's experience in scaling enterprise software companies as AI becomes critical for network operations.

feed.title: Top Financial Group Swings to Profit and Expands Hong Kong Footprint With July 2025 Acquisition
feed.summary: Top Financial Group has reported a swing to profit in the six months ended September 30, 2025, with revenue increasing to US$2.9 million. This turnaround was aided by diversification into Singapore and Australia, revenue from its loan business, and the termination of Hong Kong OTC derivatives operations. The company also expanded its Hong Kong presence through the July 2025 acquisition of Zhong Yang Financial Services, aiming to strengthen its financial services offerings and long-term growth.

feed.title: Agenus Announces First Stakeholder Webcast of 2026 Focused on BOT+BAL Program
feed.summary: Agenus will host its first Stakeholder Webcast of 2026 on January 28, 2026, to discuss the global progress of its BOT+BAL program. The webcast will feature CEO Garo Armen and an oncology expert, covering authorized access programs and clinical advancements. Over 1,200 patients have been treated with BOT+BAL, showing clinical responses across various metastatic cancers, reinforcing Agenus's leadership in immuno-oncology.
